name: LocalFalcon Product Overview
heading: __MISSING__
highlight_text: Who it is best for: Agencies and SMBs
product_overview_description:
Local Falcon is an AI-powered local SEO tracking tool designed to help businesses monitor and improve their visibility in local search results. It offers a visual, map-based interface for tracking rankings across various locations worldwide.

Source: Backlinko

Core Features

  • Monitors local rankings based on precise search locations and provides accurate data for specific geographic areas
  • Allows scanning of any location worldwide
  • Supports both Google Business and Apple Business Connect listings
  • Tracks competitors' local SEO performance and enables side-by-side comparison with your own rankings
  • Manages data for businesses with multiple locations
  • Offers consolidated view of performance across all sites
  • Delivers up-to-date insights on ranking changes and provides trend analysis over time
  • Measures frequency of appearance in local Map Pack results
  • Quantifies local search visibility
  • Generates tailored suggestions for improving local SEO and offers actionable insights based on performance data
  • Compatible with Looker Studio and Zapier and includes a REST API for custom integrations

What’s great

✅Improved local search visibility through accurate, location-specific rank tracking

✅Better understanding of competitive landscape in local markets

✅Efficient management of online presence for multi-location businesses

✅Data-driven decision making supported by real-time insights and trend analysis

✅Enhanced local SEO strategy guided by AI-generated recommendations

✅Streamlined workflow through integration with other marketing tools

✅Potential increase in local customer acquisition due to improved search rankings

✅Whitelabeled reporting is available for agencies and resellers

What’s not great

❌The platform has pretty limited scope beyond rank tracking; may require additional tools for comprehensive local SEO management

❌Their higher-tier plans needed for advanced features, potentially increasing costs for small businesses

❌They don’t have any option to whitelabel the platform, you can only whitelabel reports.

Pricing

LocalFalcon doesn’t offer any free trial but offers about 100 free credits on signup. Those are just enough to test out limited features. The paid plans are billed monthly or annually, starting at around $24 per month. The whitelabeled reporting features however is only premium plans starting at $200 per month.

Source: LocalFalcon Pricing Page
